---
title: "SMS Spam Classification"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2025-10-08"
---

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(caret)
library(textstem)
library(tm)
library(wordcloud)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(text2vec)
library(glmnet)
library(xgboost)
library(Matrix)
library(pROC)
library(kableExtra)
library(SnowballC)
library(tensorflow)
library(keras)
library(superml)
library(keras3)
```


Data Cleaning
```{r}
sms_data <- read.csv("spam.csv")

sms_data <- sms_data[!duplicated(sms_data), ] %>%
select(v2, v1) %>%
rename(text = v2, label = v1) %>%
mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("ham", "spam"), labels = c(0, 1)))

data <- sms_data %>%
mutate(text = text %>%
str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z@]", " ") %>%
str_squish() %>%
str_to_lower() %>%
str_replace_all("@", "twacc") %>%
lemmatize_strings() %>%
removeWords(stopwords("en")))

dim(data)
head(data)

```

Class Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = label, fill = label)) + geom_bar() +
labs(title = "Distribution of Ham vs Spam")
```

Word Clouds
```{r}
ham_data <- data[data$label == 0,]
spam_data <- data[data$label == 1,]

ham_wc <- termFreq(ham_data$text)
spam_wc <- termFreq(spam_data$text)

wordcloud(names(ham_wc), ham_wc, max.words = 100, random.order = FALSE, rot.per = 0.35)
wordcloud(names(spam_wc), spam_wc, max.words = 100, random.order = FALSE, rot.per = 0.35)
```

Common Word Frequencies
```{r}
top_words <- data %>%
unnest_tokens(word, text) %>%
count(label, word, sort = TRUE) %>%
group_by(label) %>%
slice_max(n, n = 30) %>%
ungroup() %>%
mutate(word = reorder_within(word, n, label))

ggplot(top_words, aes(x = n, y = word, fill = factor(label))) +
geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
facet_wrap(~ label, scales = "free_y") +
scale_y_reordered() +
labs(title = "30 Most Common Words per Label", x = "Frequency", y = NULL) +
theme_minimal()
```

Train-test split
```{r}
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(data$label, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
test_data <- data[-train_idx, ]

#Numeric labels 
y_train <- as.numeric(as.character(train_data$label))
y_test <- as.numeric(as.character(test_data$label))
```

Document-Term Matrix
```{r}

it_train <- itoken(train_data$text, 
             tokenizer = word_tokenizer,
             progressbar = FALSE)

vocab <- create_vocabulary(it_train) %>% 
  prune_vocabulary(10)

vectorizer <- vocab_vectorizer(vocab)
dtm_train <- create_dtm(it_train, vectorizer)


it_test <- itoken(test_data$text, 
             tokenizer = word_tokenizer,
             progressbar = FALSE)

dtm_test <- create_dtm(it_test, vectorizer)
dim(dtm_train)
dim(dtm_test)

```

XGBoost Model
```{r}
y_train <- as.numeric(as.character(train_data$label))
y_test <- as.numeric(as.character(test_data$label))


dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(dtm_train[,-1]), label = y_train)
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(dtm_test[,-1]), label = y_test)

params <- list(
objective = "binary:logistic",
eval_metric = "error",
max_depth = 6,
eta = 0.3,
subsample = 0.8,
colsample_bytree = 0.8
)

xgb_model <- xgb.train(params, dtrain, nrounds = 100, watchlist = list(train = dtrain, eval = dtest), early_stopping_rounds = 10, verbose = 1)

predictions <- predict(xgb_model, as.matrix(dtm_test[,-1]))
pred_labels <- ifelse(predictions > 0.5, 1, 0)

confusion_matrix <- table(Predicted = pred_labels, Actual = y_test)
confusion_matrix

TN <- confusion_matrix[1, 1]  
FP <- confusion_matrix[2, 1]   
FN <- confusion_matrix[1, 2]  
TP <- confusion_matrix[2, 2] 

# Additional metrics
accuracy_1 <- (TP + TN) / sum(confusion_matrix)
precision_1 <- TP / (TP + FP)
recall_1 <- TP / (TP + FN)  
specificity_1 <- TN / (TN + FP)
f1_score <- 2 * (precision_1 * recall_1) / (precision_1 + recall_1)


# Calculate AUC
roc_obj <- roc(y_test, predictions)
auc_value_1 <- auc(roc_obj)

# feature importance
xgb.plot.importance(xgb.importance(model = xgb_model))
```

TF-IDF + LASSO
```{r}
model_tfidf <- TfIdf$new()
tfidf_train <- model_tfidf$fit_transform(dtm_train)
tfidf_test <- model_tfidf$transform(dtm_test)

tfidf_train <- as_tibble(as.matrix(tfidf_train)) %>% 
  mutate(Y = train_data$label)

tfidf_test <- as_tibble(as.matrix(tfidf_test)) %>% 
  mutate(Y = test_data$label)

lambda_seq <- 10^seq(-4, 0, length = 20)

lasso <- caret::train(
  Y ~ ., 
  data = tfidf_train,
  method = "glmnet",
  trControl = caret::trainControl("cv", number = 5),
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = lambda_seq),
  preProcess = c("scale")
)


best_lambda <- lasso$bestTune$lambda
best_lambda

confusion_matrix <- confusionMatrix(predict(lasso, tfidf_test), tfidf_test$Y, positive="1")

confusion_matrix

# Additional metrics
accuracy_2 <- confusion_matrix$overall["Accuracy"]
precision_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Pos Pred Value'] 
recall_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Sensitivity']
f1_score_2 <- 2 * ((precision_2 * recall_2) / (precision_2 + recall_2))
specificity_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Specificity'] 

# Calculate AUC
predictions <- predict(lasso, tfidf_test, type = "prob")[,2]  
roc_obj <- roc(y_test, predictions)
auc_value_2 <- auc(roc_obj)

```
GloVe Embedding
```{r}
# Training data tcm
tcm <- create_tcm(it_train, vectorizer, skip_grams_window = 5)
# Train GloVe
glove <- GlobalVectors$new(rank = 100, x_max = 10)
wv_main <- glove$fit_transform(tcm, n_iter = 20)
word_vectors <- wv_main + t(glove$components)



```
GloVe + LASSO Embedding
```{r}

glove_train <- as_tibble(as.matrix(dtm_train %*% word_vectors)) %>% mutate(Y = train_data$label)
glove_test <- as_tibble(as.matrix(dtm_test %*% word_vectors)) %>% mutate(Y = test_data$label)

lambda_seq <- 10^seq(-4, 0, length = 20)

lasso_glove <- caret::train(
  Y ~ ., 
  data = glove_train,
  method = "glmnet",
  trControl = caret::trainControl("cv", number = 5),
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = lambda_seq),
  preProcess = c("scale")
)

best_lambda <- lasso_glove$bestTune$lambda
best_lambda
confusion_matrix <- confusionMatrix(predict(lasso_glove, glove_test), glove_test$Y, positive="1")
confusion_matrix

# Additional metrics
accuracy_3 <- confusion_matrix$overall["Accuracy"]
precision_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Pos Pred Value'] 
recall_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Sensitivity']
f1_score_3 <- 2 * ((precision_3 * recall_3) / (precision_3 + recall_3))
specificity_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Specificity'] 

# Calculate AUC
predictions <- predict(lasso_glove, glove_test, type = "prob")[,2]  
roc_obj <- roc(y_test, predictions)
auc_value_3 <- auc(roc_obj)

```

Glove Embedding + LSTM
```{r}

# Number of unique words
paste(train_data$text, collapse = " ") %>% 
  str_split(" ") %>% 
  unlist() %>% 
  n_distinct() # 5628 unique words

tokenizer <- text_tokenizer(num_words = 5600)  # Keep top 5600 words
tokenizer %>% fit_text_tokenizer(train_data$text)

train_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, train_data$text)
test_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, test_data$text)

# Pad sequences to same length
# Calculate sequence length that is in the 95% percentile of the training data
seq_lengths <- sapply(train_sequences, length)
max_length <- min(100, quantile(seq_lengths, 0.95) %>% as.integer())
cat("Using sequence length:", max_length, "\n")

X_train <- pad_sequences(train_sequences, maxlen = max_length, padding = 'post', truncating = 'post')
X_test <- pad_sequences(test_sequences, maxlen = max_length, padding = 'post', truncating = 'post')

y_train <- as.numeric(as.character(train_data$label))
y_test <- as.numeric(as.character(test_data$label))

# Create embedding matrix
num_words <- min(tokenizer$num_words, length(tokenizer$word_index))
embedding_matrix <- array(0, c(num_words + 1, 100))  

for (word in names(tokenizer$word_index)) {
  idx <- tokenizer$word_index[[word]]
  if (idx <= num_words && word %in% rownames(word_vectors)) {
    embedding_matrix[idx + 1, ] <- word_vectors[word, ]  
  }
}

# Building LSTM model
model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_embedding(
    input_dim = num_words + 1,
    output_dim = 100,
    input_length = max_length,
    weights = list(embedding_matrix),
    trainable = FALSE
  ) %>%
  layer_lstm(
    units = 64,
    dropout = 0.4,
    recurrent_dropout = 0.4
  ) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 32, activation = "relu") %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1, activation = "sigmoid")

# Compile model
model %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.01),
  loss = "binary_crossentropy",
  metrics = "accuracy"
)

summary(model)

# Step 9: Train the model
cat("Starting training...\n")
history <- model %>% fit(
  X_train, y_train,
  epochs = 50,
  batch_size = 32,
  view_metrics = FALSE 
)

# Step 10: Evaluate
predictions <- model %>% predict(X_test)
predicted_classes <- ifelse(predictions > 0.5, 1, 0)

# Calculate metrics with error handling
confusion_matrix <- table(Predicted = predicted_classes, Actual = y_test)

# Print the confusion matrix to see what's happening
print("Confusion Matrix:")
print(confusion_matrix)

TN <- confusion_matrix[1, 1]  # True Negative
FP <- confusion_matrix[2, 1]  # False Positive  
FN <- confusion_matrix[1, 2]  # False Negative
TP <- confusion_matrix[2, 2]  # True Positive

# Additional metrics
accuracy_4 <- (TP + TN) / sum(confusion_matrix)
precision_4 <- TP / (TP + FP)
recall_4 <- TP / (TP + FN)  # Sensitivity
specificity_4 <- TN / (TN + FP)
f1_score <- 2 * (precision_4 * recall_4) / (precision_4 + recall_4)

# Calculate AUC
roc_obj <- roc(y_test, predictions)
auc_value_4 <- auc(roc_obj)
cat("AUC:", round(auc_value, 4), "\n")

```

All metric and evaluation scores for all models
```{r}
cat("XGBoost:\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(accuracy_1, 4), "\n")
cat("Precision:", round(precision_1, 4), "\n")
cat("Recall:", round(recall_1, 4), "\n")
cat("F1-Score:", round(f1_score_1, 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(specificity_1, 4), "\n")
cat("AUC:", round(auc_value_1, 4), "\n\n")

cat("TF-IDF + LASSO:\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(accuracy_2, 4), "\n")
cat("Precision:", round(precision_2, 4), "\n")
cat("Recall:", round(recall_2, 4), "\n")
cat("F1-Score:", round(f1_score_2, 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(specificity_2, 4), "\n")
cat("AUC:", round(auc_value_2, 4), "\n\n")

cat("GloVe Embedding + LASSO:\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(accuracy_3, 4), "\n")
cat("Precision:", round(precision_3, 4), "\n")
cat("Recall:", round(recall_3, 4), "\n")
cat("F1-Score:", round(f1_score_3, 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(specificity_3, 4), "\n")
cat("AUC:", round(auc_value_3, 4), "\n\n")

cat("Glove Embedding + LSTM:\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(accuracy_4, 4), "\n")
cat("Precision:", round(precision_4, 4), "\n")
cat("Recall:", round(recall_4, 4), "\n")
cat("F1-Score:", round(f1_score_4, 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(specificity_4, 4), "\n")
cat("AUC:", round(auc_value_4, 4), "\n\n")

```
